samples.xml_description:
Implement a 16-bit full adder in combinational logic. 16-bit input operand A. 16-bit input operand B. Carry-in input. 16-bit sum output. Carry-out output.

Design a 16-bit full adder.

Use a single assign statement to perform addition.
